canonical_definition: A multilingual commonsense reasoning benchmark (Cross-lingual CommonSense QA) used to evaluate a model's ability to answer commonsense questions in various languages.
papers: How do Large Language Models Handle Multilingualism?
MindMerger: Efficiently Boosting LLM Reasoning in non-English Languages
